notes: Hand-authored focused OpenAPI 3.0.3 modeling the Salesforce REST API resources the salesforce adaptor uses via jsforce: sObject describe / describe-global, single-record CRUD (create/insert, retrieve, update, destroy), external-ID upsert, SOQL query / queryAll / queryMore, and composite sObject collections (bulk create/update/delete). API version appears as the {version} path parameter (e.g. 59.0). update and destroy return 204 No Content. The full Salesforce REST surface (bulk API v1/v2 jobs, Analytics, Chatter, Tooling, Metadata, Apex REST) is intentionally out of scope; the bulk1/bulk2 adaptor modules submit Bulk API jobs not modeled here. Response shapes (CreateResult, UpsertResult, QueryResult, DescribeSObjectResult, SaveResult) reflect the documented Salesforce REST responses and jsforce return values.
